title: Reject unsafe recovery paths and duplicate live ownership
description: Final review blocker: manifests are insufficiently validated and resume may trust path fields outside the repo-namespaced state root. Validate complete tick path shape/containment against deterministic plan; reject malicious/corrupt paths. Add live ownership/heartbeat semantics so a long silent child is not reopened solely by age. Preserve cross-runner recovery without session IDs.
acceptance_criteria: A matching-repo manifest with prompt/report/log/worktree outside its deterministic state namespace is rejected; fresh/live ownership blocks duplicate launch; stale ownership can resume safely; tests cover path traversal/absolute redirects and silent live child.
closed_reason: Completed: recovery now validates deterministic path containment/shape against repo namespace, rejects malicious manifests/symlink escapes, and uses atomic controller leases with silent-child heartbeats, safe takeover/release, and adversarial tests.
